comment: PromQL function definition for Kibana. See https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/querying/functions/
name: day_of_week
description: returns the day of the week for each of those timestamps (in UTC). Returned values are from 0 to 6, where 0 means Sunday.

params.name: v
params.description: Optional instant vector input. If omitted, evaluation timestamp is used.
